How's it going everyone? In this video I'm going to show you how to create a ClickFunnels account. We're also going to show you some of the basics of ClickFunnels. Below this video is a link to ClickFunnels. Please use that link, that button, to get to ClickFunnels. You can see they just talked about gym launch there. We have a great partnership with them. That link allows us to track who's signing up for us. Once you're on ClickFunnels, you want to go ahead and scroll down and you want to look for this free 14-day trial. They give you 14 days. It doesn't bill you anything at all. Once you click on that, it's going to ask for your name and email address and a password. Make sure you type in a good password and remember what it is. Once that's done, hit that green get started button. Then it's actually going to ask for your billing information. If you don't have that handy, make sure you get that and enter it in. It doesn't bill your card right now. It's going to bill it later on. Once you enter in all your billing information, the credit card number, CBC code, expiration, month and year, you do need to agree to the terms of service and you can also add in the secret funnels training if you want to. Once that's done, go ahead and hit that start your free 14-day trial and you're ready to go. I don't want to save the password for this. I'm going to just close that out. We already have an account, so I'm going to go ahead and log into that. This is what your main page of ClickFunnels is going to look like. It shows you some information over here on the left about your account, how many visitors, how many contacts pages funnels. At the top right is your main menu. This is where a lot of the important stuff is. When you move your mouse over ClickFunnels and ClickFunnels, that's going to take you to a list of all the funnels on your account. If you've just created your account, it's going to be empty. It also has where you can see your contacts, if you made sales, it gives you the funnel marketplace where you can buy pre-made funnels from other people, and then start the process to build a funnel right away from scratch. Actionetics gives you a lot of advanced features. As part of ClickFunnels, you can explore those on your own. They have the backpack, which allows you to get to this dashboard, the same one we're looking at now, and some other useful information as well as settings. You have the help and the help is super useful, so make sure you use that help so you can get more familiar with it. If you have any notifications, it'll show those notifications there. And then the portrait at the top right gives you all of your settings. So I'm going to go through some of the basics in here. The account details is where you can set your profile, you can set your time zone. If you want to set it up to link into WordPress, you can do that as well. Billing covers your billing information. Page templates or personal templates that you make or you create from funnels that you can use, that way you don't have to create everything from scratch. Notifications covers what it's going to cause a notification. Digital assets are all of the images and other things that you upload to ClickFunnels. When you click on that, you're able to go through and work with everything in there. Integrations covers how to integrate it. They only have a couple of options here, but you can also add new integrations by clicking that add new integration. And here you're going to see a whole bunch. So if you don't have integrations, you're probably going to see this first. And there's a lot of things that we'll connect to. Payment gateways is if you want to set up payment processing. Outgoing SMTPs, if you want to set up email, so say you have your own custom email service, you can set up outgoing SMTPs so that sends messages. Domains is super important. So if you don't have a domain already, you probably want to go ahead and buy a domain through here. So in this domains, you'll click on add a domain. And you're probably going to see this screen when you click on domain since you won't have one. We already have one. That's why it didn't take us right here. If you already own a domain name, you can use your existing one. If you want to create a new one, you don't have one. This is a great place to go and create your domain. So if you choose a domain, it's going to have you just start typing in. And it's going to show you all of them that are available. And it's only $20. I believe that's per year. Once you click on it, it'll start walking you through the process. It'll pay. I don't want to buy this one now, but that's how quick and easy it is to get a domain name associated. Domains are great because that way you can send those links and they're customized. Global unsubscribes are for people who have unsubscribed or you don't want them to ever get those notifications. So say somebody says, get me off of your list. I keep getting emails. This is where you can come in here and add in notifications. Hopefully that won't happen to you though. Account sharing is where you can share your account with other people. They're able to go into the account and manage it and make changes. So that's a quick run through of ClickFunnels. Hope you enjoyed this video. The funnels that we're going to provide are going to be pretty much different for every play. Let us know if you have any questions and hope you have a great rest of your day.
